ISSUE TITLE: Login button unresponsive on Safari 17
DESCRIPTION: Users report clicking the login button on Safari 17.x does nothing. Console shows: 'TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading addEventListener)'. Affects ~15% of sessions from iOS/macOS. Regression introduced in v2.3.1.

GitHub issue title: 'TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined reading map in DataTable component'
Body: Users report the dashboard crashes when the API returns an empty array for the metrics endpoint. Stack trace points to src/components/DataTable.jsx line 47. Reproducible 100% of the time when metrics list is empty. Production is affected.

user:
Issue title: 'Login endpoint returns 500 on valid JWT after recent auth middleware refactor'
Body: Users are reporting they cannot log in at all since deploy v2.4.1. The /api/auth/login route throws an unhandled exception. Stack trace shows null pointer in JwtValidator.validate(). This is blocking all users from accessing the platform.
